_doc: Theme registry + channel slug map for the podcast knowledge base. The /podcast-insights skill reads this FIRST every run to know the current theme set (clustering anchors) and the canonical channel->slug map (used to build deterministic insight IDs). Slugs are immutable once created. A merged/renamed theme keeps its row forever as a tombstone (status: merged, mergedInto: <slug>) so old links and IDs still resolve. Theme pages live at themes/<slug>.md and are created on first populated insight, not here.
